title: Leo's Marathon Count
text: Leo counted 3,482 runners crossing the marathon starting arch. He wants to quickly report about how many runners entered.
keyQuestion: How should Leo round 3,482 to the nearest 1,000?
mascotTip: Look at the hundreds digit (4). Is it 5 or more?

title: Emma's Charity Drive
text: Emma collected $48,732 during the school's annual charity fundraiser. Her school principal wants to print the rounded goal on the banner.
keyQuestion: What is $48,732 rounded to the nearest 10,000?
mascotTip: Check the thousands digit (8). 8 ≥ 5 means round UP!

title: Alex's Stadium Spectacle
text: Alex attended a grand sports match with 68,472 cheering fans in the stadium. The big stadium screen estimated the crowd.
keyQuestion: What is 68,472 rounded to the nearest 1,000?
mascotTip: Check the hundreds digit (4). 4 < 5 keeps 68 thousands!

title: Maya's Lunar Rocket Expedition
text: Maya watched a rocket launch heading to the Moon, which is 384,400 kilometers away from Earth.
keyQuestion: What is 384,400 rounded to the nearest 100,000?
mascotTip: Check the ten-thousands digit (8). 8 ≥ 5 rounds up to 400,000 km!
